title: Minor test tweak for podman-remote compatibility
body:
The new #4136 added a new test (multiple-parse). Make a small
change to it so it passes under podman-remote.

(Reason: the test was checking for a full Dockerfile2 path.
podman-remote only displays basenames).

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body: Discovered in treadmill. It's perfectly fine to reject this - I can just `skip` the new test in podman-remote.
LGTM.  I don't foresee imagebuilder changing the text in that error message in the near future.
